name: Lemony Rotelli with Zucchini, Cannellini Beans, and Mint
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups cooked cannellini beans (OR 1 12-oz can, drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Try garbanzos or black beans for color.
2. Bring a large pot of water to a boil for cooking the pasta.
3. Using a metal grater, shred the zucchini into a large bowl and set aside.
4. In a large nonstick skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
5. Add the garlic and red pepper flakes, and sauté for about 1 minute.
6. Increase the heat to high, and add the zucchini, lemon zest, lemon juice, and broth.
7. Cook for about 5 minutes or until the zucchini is soft and just cooked through.
8. Gently stir in the cannellini beans, and cook for another minute.
9. Lightly season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Cook the rotelli according to package directions until al dente.
11. Drain, and place back into the pot.
12. Pour the zucchini sauce over the pasta, add the mint, and toss until combined.
13. Transfer the rotelli to pasta bowls, and serve with Romano cheese.
14. Serves 4-6.
Per serving: 409 cal / 10% fat / 6g total fat / 1g sat fat / 5mg chol / 16g prot
/ 73g carb / 502mg sodium / 6g fiber
